info.title: Luqen LLM Service
info.description: LLM provider management and AI capabilities service

post.summary: Generate an AI executive summary for a scan report

get.summary: List capabilities with assigned models per capability

post.summary: Agent conversation streaming endpoint (SSE token frames)
post.description: Returns text/event-stream — body is documented; response is hijacked. See AgentService docs.

put.summary: Assign a model to a capability (creates priority slot)

delete.summary: Unassign a model from a capability

patch.summary: Update priority of a capability assignment

post.summary: Create a new OAuth client (returns plaintext secret once)
Auto-detect brand colors, fonts, and logo from a URL
Extract requirements from a regulation document
Generate an AI fix suggestion for a WCAG issue
Rewrite a notification template using configured LLM, with deterministic fallback
MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint (JSON-RPC over POST)
post.description: Bearer-token gated. Body is a JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope; per-tool input/output schemas are advertised via tools/list.

get.summary: List registered models, optionally filtered by providerId

post.summary: Register a new model under a provider
Revoke a token (no-op for stateless JWT — always 200)
Exchange credentials for an access token (client_credentials or password grant)

get.summary: Get prompt template (override if set, else default)

put.summary: Set per-org prompt override (validates locked sections)

get.summary: List models advertised by the upstream provider

post.summary: Run a connectivity health-check against the provider

get.summary: System overview: provider/model count, capability coverage
